info.title: RoyalGate Supplies API
info.description:
REST API for RoyalGate Supplies — a Nigerian B2B FMCG distribution platform.

**Base path:** all routes are prefixed `/api/v1` except `/health`.

**Response envelope:** successful responses are wrapped as `{ success: true, message, data }`; errors as `{ success: false, message, errors[], code }`.

**Money:** all amounts are integers in **kobo** (₦1 = 100 kobo).

**Auth:** most endpoints require a Bearer JWT. Endpoints marked public (signup, catalog reads, webhooks) do not.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Signup (BVN-first KYC), OTP, login, JWT refresh, TOTP for admins

tags.name: Buyer
tags.description: Buyer profile, addresses, account types, POD eligibility

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Catalog CRUD, categories, stock, account-type restrictions

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: Order lifecycle, fraud scoring, delivery zone/slot assignment

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Wallet ledger, PremiumTrust funding, Chowdeck split checkout, refunds

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Buyer approval, KYC manual review, finance, audit, team management

errors.description: Field-level validation messages. Empty array for non-validation errors.

code.description: Machine-readable error code (maps from HTTP status).

data.description: Response payload — shape varies per endpoint.

bvn_reference.description: One-time reference token (30-min Redis TTL) passed back to the register step.

full_name.description: Full name pulled from the BVN record (used to prefill registration).

phone_masked.description: Phone number on the BVN record, masked to the last four digits.

reference.description: The new user id — used as the reference for subsequent verification steps.

phone.description: Phone number the OTP was dispatched to (E.164).

phone_masked.description: The dispatch phone masked to the last four digits.

dev_otp.description: Development-only OTP echo. Present only when NODE_ENV !== production.

bvn_reference.description: Reference token from BVN lookup step

referral_code.description: Optional referral code from an existing buyer. Used to attribute this signup as a referral; ignored if the code does not match anyone.

dev_otp.description: Development-only OTP echo. Present only when NODE_ENV !== production.

phone_verified.description: True once the OTP matched and the phone is verified.

bvn_verified.description: True once the identity (BVN + selfie) is verified.

decision.description: KYC decision tier derived from liveness + face-match scores.

face_match_score.description: Face-match confidence score (selfie vs BVN photo, 0–100).

message.example: Identity verified. Your account is pending admin approval.

cac_verified.description: True once the CAC (RC/BN) number is verified.

dpr_required.description: Whether this account type additionally requires a DPR licence (fuel stations).

dpr_submitted.description: Whether a DPR licence + document were submitted for manual admin review.

dpr_document.description: Base64-encoded DPR licence document (PDF/JPEG/PNG), fuel stations only

nin_verified.description: True once the NIN name matches the registered name.

refresh_token.description: JWT refresh token — POST to /auth/refresh to rotate.

must_change_password.description: Present when the account must rotate a temporary password before continuing.

phone_masked.description: Phone masked to the last 4 digits.

full_name.description: Full name from the BVN record.

dpr_licence_verified.description: Whether the DPR licence has been confirmed by an admin.

nin_verified.description: Whether NIN is verified (unlocks POD + lifts the order cap).

pod_eligible.description: Whether Pay on Delivery is enabled for this buyer.

pod_default_count.description: Number of POD defaults recorded against this buyer.

approved_at.description: When an admin approved the account.

delivery_zone_id.description: UUID of the delivery zone this address falls under

totalReferrals.description: Total buyers who signed up with this referral code.

convertedReferrals.description: Referred buyers with at least one delivered order.

shareUrl.description: Shareable signup URL carrying the referral code.

order_ref.description: Human-readable order reference (also the transfer reference).

amount_kobo.description: Order total in kobo (alias of total_kobo).

reference.description: Transfer narration/reference the buyer should use.

bank_name.description: RoyalGate bank name for manual transfer.

account_number.description: RoyalGate account number for manual transfer.

amount_kobo.description: Amount owed in kobo (present when unpaid).

reserved_account_number.description: Buyer's permanent PremiumTrust reserved account number (null until provisioned).

reserved_account_bank.description: Bank name for the reserved account.

reserved_account_name.description: Account name on the reserved account.

wallet_id.description: Wallet this row belongs to (UUID v4).

balance_after_kobo.description: Wallet balance in kobo immediately after this row.

order_id.description: Related order id, when the movement pays/refunds an order.

idempotency_key.description: Unique idempotency key that dedupes re-fired movements.

created_by.description: Admin who made a MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT (else null).

wallet_balance_kobo.description: Current buyer wallet balance in kobo.

covers.description: True when the wallet balance fully covers the order total.

shortfall_kobo.description: Amount still owed after applying the wallet balance, in kobo (0 when covered).

funding_account_number.description: Buyer's permanent reserved account number to fund the wallet.

funding_account_bank.description: Bank name for the reserved funding account.

funding_account_name.description: Account name on the reserved funding account.

paid.description: True once the order is settled from the wallet.

shortfall_kobo.description: Amount still needed in kobo when the balance cannot cover the order (paid=false).

account_number.description: Virtual account number to transfer into.

bank_name.description: Bank name for the virtual account.

account_name.description: Account name on the virtual account.

expires_at.description: When the virtual account expires (null if it does not expire).

order_id.description: Order whose payment is being manually confirmed (UUID v4).

bank_ref.description: Bank transaction reference proving the transfer landed.

refunded.description: True once the refund credit lands in the wallet.

order_id.description: Order to refund (UUID v4). Must be a paid order.

amount_kobo.description: Partial refund amount in kobo (string). Defaults to the full order total when omitted.

total_liability_kobo.description: Sum of all buyer wallet balances in kobo.

user_id.description: Buyer whose wallet is being adjusted (UUID v4).

amount_kobo.description: Adjustment in kobo. Positive = credit, negative = debit. Must be a non-zero integer.

revenue_kobo.description: Revenue attributed to this product in kobo (string).

total.description: Total matching transactions across all pages.

amount_kobo.description: Paid amount owed back in kobo (string).

product_name.description: Product name snapshot at order time.

unit_price_kobo.description: Unit price in kobo (bigint as string).

line_total_kobo.description: Line total in kobo (bigint as string).

subtotal_kobo.description: Items subtotal in kobo (bigint as string).

delivery_fee_kobo.description: Delivery fee in kobo (bigint as string).

total_kobo.description: Grand total in kobo (bigint as string).

agent_id.description: Assigned agent user id, if dispatched.

delivery_sequence.description: Position in the agent tour, or null.

needs_zone_review.description: Whether the order needs a zone review (zone deactivated).

delivery_zone_id.description: Delivery zone id (UUID); must be an active zone.

delivery_slot_id.description: Delivery slot id (UUID); must be non-blackout with capacity left.

payment_method.description: Payment method. POD requires a POD-eligible (NIN-verified) buyer.

delivery_notes.description: Optional delivery notes (merged into the stored address).

secret.description: Base32 TOTP secret to load into an authenticator app.

otpauth_url.description: otpauth:// provisioning URI (render as a QR code).

backup_codes.description: One-time backup codes (shown once — store securely).

totp_setup.description: Present only on first login — the TOTP enrolment block. Absent on subsequent logins.

message.description: Message to buyer requesting more information

decision.description: Admin decision on a buyer waiting in the KYC manual-review queue

reason.description: Reason or notes for the decision

decision.description: Admin decision on a fuel station's DPR/NMDPRA petroleum licence

skipped.description: Buyer ids that were skipped (already resolved, not found, or invalid state).

buyer_ids.description: Buyer IDs to approve in batch

skipped.description: Buyer ids that were skipped (already resolved, not found, or invalid state).

buyer_ids.description: Buyer IDs to reject in batch

sequence.description: Position in the agent tour, lower = earlier

masked.description: True when the value is masked because it is a secret.

price_kobo.description: Unit price in kobo (bigint as string).

stock_qty.description: Current stock quantity (internal signal; not a hard order constraint).

low_stock_threshold.description: Threshold at/below which the product is flagged low-stock.

restricted_to.description: Account types this product is restricted to, or null for everyone.

photo_url.description: Product photo URL, or null (client renders a placeholder).

created_by.description: Admin user id that created the product.

image.description: Base64-encoded JPEG/PNG image, optionally with a `data:image/...;base64,` prefix. Run through the sharp pipeline (EXIF-rotate, fit 1600×1600, WebP q82) before storage.

body.example: Delivered on time and well packaged.

verified_buyer.description: Always true — reviews require a delivered order.

average.description: Average rating (1 decimal), 0 if no reviews.

moderated_by.description: Admin id that last moderated the review.

moderated_at.description: When the review was last moderated.

order_id.description: UUID of the order this review is tied to
Order id the review is tied to.

moderated_by.description: Admin id that last moderated the review.

moderated_at.description: When the review was last moderated.

moderation_note.description: Optional moderator note (e.g. why a review was hidden)

price_kobo.description: Unit price in kobo (bigint as string).

delivery_fee_kobo.description: Delivery fee in kobo (bigint as string).

is_active.description: Whether the zone currently serves orders.

is_blackout.description: Whether the slot has been blacked out.

is_active.description: Target active state. Deactivating flags pending orders in the zone for review.

zone_id.description: Zone id (UUID) the slot belongs to.
Zone id (UUID) whose slots to black out.

date.description: Date (YYYY-MM-DD) to black out all slots for.

minutes_silent.description: Minutes since last GPS ping (null if never reported).

is_available.description: Whether the agent is currently accepting deliveries.

total.description: Total matching agents across all pages.

is_available.description: Whether the agent is currently accepting deliveries.

orders.description: Page of orders assigned to the agent.

total.description: Total assigned orders across all pages.

zone_id.description: Delivery zone to assign the agent to (UUID v4).

is_available.description: Whether the agent is accepting deliveries.

status.description: Target status. Agents may only issue OUT_FOR_DELIVERY, DELIVERED, or FAILED.

pod_photo_url.description: CDN URL of the stored POD photo.

failure_photo_url.description: CDN URL of the stored failure photo.
